title: alternanthera hirtula subvar. cinabarina
intro: Alternanthera hirtula subvar. cinabarina, also known as Ruby Ball or Ruby Ball Plant, is a type of flowering plant in the amaranth family (Amaranthaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Alternanthera hirtula subvar. cinabarina include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
